specs.notes: Primary spec for class system — mb_class_register, C3 MRO computation, __init_subclass__, __set_name__ hooks. The 3-arg type() path shares this infrastructure.
Contains mb_type() and mb_type3() implementations. The dispatch between 1-arg and 3-arg type() lives in builtins.rs.
Stdlib builtins module that exposes type() as dispatch_type -> mb_type / mb_type3. The dispatch_type wrapper must route 1-arg to mb_type and 3-arg to mb_type3.

context_notes: The 3-arg type(name, bases, namespace) implementation (#974) adds mb_type3() in runtime/builtins.rs. This calls mb_class_register() in runtime/class.rs which performs C3 MRO computation, __init_subclass__ hooks, and __set_name__ dispatch. The class statement desugars to mb_class_register via hir_to_mir lowering, sharing the same infrastructure. The returned type object is an Instance{class_name='type', fields={__name__: name_str, __bases__: bases_tuple}}. MRO failures raise TypeError. The builtin dispatch (in stdlib/builtins_mod.rs) routes type(x) to mb_type for 1-arg and type(name, bases, dict) to mb_type3 for 3-arg.
